title: Investigate Salesforce Chrome Extension Causing Page Load Delays
description: Investigation determined this was NOT a DataTools Pro issue. The page load delay was caused by a Salesforce Chrome extension (`chrome-extension://jjghhkepijgakdammjldcbnjehfkfmha`) throwing an uncaught DOMException when trying to parse page data via XPath after the DOM had mutated. The error occurred in the extension's `page-context-builder.bundle.js`.
acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified as external Chrome extension
No DataTools Pro code changes required
implementation_notes: The error was from the Salesforce Chrome extension's page context builder, not from DataTools Pro code. No fix needed on the app side.
